JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS CHUNG CHOU CITY (LA#2) INC, CHUNG CHOU CITY, INC. #3, CHUNG CHOU CITY, INC. #4, CHUNG CHOU CITY, INC. #6, CHUNG CHOU CITY, INC. 	'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHIFTS THE BURDEN AND NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT RAISED. A VALID INDEMNIFICATION AGREEMENT EXISTED COVERING THE UNDERLYING LAWSUIT OBLIGATING DEFENDANT TO INDEMNIFY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTFF WAS UNDER NO OBLIGATION TO COOPERATE IN THE DEFENSE, AND WAS FREE TO CONDUCT ITS OWN DEFENSE EVEN IF THERE WAS A DUTY TO DEFEND. C.C. SECTION 2778 (4). DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHOW THE SETTLEMENT WAS UNREASONABLE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle Scannell (345.0545) for plaintiffs and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS CHUNG CHOU CITY (LA#2) INC, CHUNG CHOU CITY, INC. #3, CHUNG CHOU CITY, INC. #4, CHUNG CHOU CITY, INC. #6, CHUNG CHOU CITY, INC. 'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Plaintiff shifts the burden and no triable issue of material fact raised. A valid indemnification agreement existed covering the underlying lawsuit obligating defendant to indemnify plaintiff. Plaintff was under no obligation to cooperate in the defense, and was free to conduct its own defense even if there was a duty to defend. C.C. section 2778 (4). Defendant fails to show the settlement was unreasonable. Order signed in open court. Order regarding plaintiffs' request for ruling on evidentiary objections and objections to defendant's evidence filed. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-20-2010 Continued To Aug-26-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
